name: REA Group Limited
description: REA Group Limited is a leading global digital business specializing in the property sector. Headquartered in Australia, the company operates a network of prominent real estate websites and digital platforms across Australia, Asia, and North America. REA Group is dedicated to changing the way the world experiences property by providing innovative digital solutions, data-driven market insights, and comprehensive tools that connect property seekers, sellers, and real estate professionals. Through its commitment to technology and sustainable business practices, the group continues to drive growth and deliver value to its shareholders, customers, and the broader community.
